title: Bruce Robertson
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Bruce Robertson''' provided the voice for [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Kael (officer)|Kael]] in ''[[Star Wars: Episode I: Battle for Naboo]]''. He also provided additional voices for ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.

===Gameography===
*''[[Star Wars: Episode I: Battle for Naboo]]''
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''
